description: Fixed-price software development SOW, $150K total, 3 milestone payments, client IP ownership
parsed_text:
STATEMENT OF WORK NO. SOW-2025-014

This Statement of Work ("SOW") is entered into as of February 1, 2025, pursuant to the Master Service Agreement dated January 10, 2025, between:

BluePath Retail Solutions, Inc. ("Client")
4501 Meridian Drive, Suite 200
Scottsdale, AZ 85251
Client Contact: Jennifer Okafor, VP of Technology
Client PO Number: PO-2025-00347

and

CodeForge Development Group, LLC ("Vendor")
220 E. Congress Street, Suite 500
Tucson, AZ 85701
Vendor Contact: Derek Voss, Project Manager

SOW Title: E-Commerce Platform Redesign and Payment Gateway Integration

1. PROJECT DESCRIPTION
Vendor shall design, develop, test, and deploy a redesigned e-commerce platform for Client, including a new React-based frontend, Node.js API layer, PostgreSQL database migration, and integration with Stripe and PayPal payment gateways. The scope includes mobile-responsive design, user authentication, product catalog management, order processing, and an administrative dashboard.

2. TERM
Effective Date: February 1, 2025
Project End Date: July 31, 2025

3. DELIVERABLES AND SCHEDULE

| Deliverable | Description | Due Date |
|-------------|-------------|----------|
| Milestone 1: Design & Architecture | Wireframes, UI/UX designs, system architecture document, and approved technical specification | March 15, 2025 |
| Milestone 2: Development & Integration | Fully functional frontend and backend code, payment gateway integration, and unit test results | June 1, 2025 |
| Milestone 3: UAT & Deployment | User acceptance testing report, defect resolution, production deployment, and post-launch support documentation | July 31, 2025 |

4. PRICING AND PAYMENT
Pricing Model: Fixed Price
Total Contract Value: $150,000.00 USD

Payment Schedule:
- Milestone 1 Completion: $45,000.00 (30%) — due upon Client written acceptance of design deliverables
- Milestone 2 Completion: $75,000.00 (50%) — due upon Client written acceptance of development deliverables
- Milestone 3 Completion: $30,000.00 (20%) — due upon production deployment and go-live sign-off

Payment Terms: Net 30 days from date of invoice following milestone acceptance.

5. ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
Each deliverable shall be subject to a ten (10)-business-day acceptance period. Client shall review each deliverable and either: (a) provide written acceptance, or (b) provide a written punch list of defects. Vendor shall have fifteen (15) business days to remediate identified defects.

6. CHANGE ORDER PROCESS
Any change to scope, schedule, or pricing must be documented in a written Change Order executed by authorized representatives of both parties. No work shall be performed under a Change Order until it is fully executed. Change Orders shall include a description of the change, impact on schedule, and impact on total contract value.

7. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All work product, deliverables, source code, documentation, and other materials developed by Vendor under this SOW shall be considered works-made-for-hire and shall be the exclusive property of Client upon full payment of all fees. Vendor hereby assigns to Client all right, title, and interest in and to such work product.

8. GOVERNING LAW
This SOW shall be governed by the laws of the State of Arizona.

BluePath Retail Solutions, Inc.             CodeForge Development Group, LLC
By: /s/ Jennifer Okafor                     By: /s/ Derek Voss
Name: Jennifer Okafor                       Name: Derek Voss
Title: VP of Technology                     Title: Project Manager
Date: February 1, 2025                      Date: February 1, 2025
